text_original: Pretty decent character interaction. of course, like all other AI games it's a pay to play deal although the price isn't that bad compared to others.
text_zh: 角色互动相当不错。当然，和所有其他 AI 游戏一样，这也是一个付费项目，不过与其他游戏相比，价格还不算太糟。
reply_original: Thank you so much for your kind words! We are thrilled to hear you're enjoying the character interactions. We strive to keep our pricing fair while maintaining high-quality AI. Your support helps us keep the magic alive! If you ever have suggestions or need help, feel free to reach out at support@fantachat.ai. Have fun chatting!
reply_zh: 非常感谢您的赞美！听到您喜欢角色互动，我们感到非常激动。我们致力于在保持高质量 AI 的同时，确保定价公平。您的支持帮助我们延续这份魔法！如果您有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。祝您聊天愉快！
